description: Behavioral replication of the a/an majority-class test from Latent Planning Emerges with Scale, evaluated on Gemma 3 270M without circuit tracing.

in_context_examples.text: Someone who studies living organisms is a biologist.
Someone who studies ancient objects and sites is an archaeologist.
